name: Mushroom Madness- Dkp
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Curry powder or to taste
6 Slices Seedless Russian Rye bread (or pumpernickel)
recipeInstructions:
1. For the marinade, combine the first nine ingredients in a large bowl; blend well.
2. Whisk in olive oil. Add mushrooms and onion and toss lightly to coat.
3. Set aside.
4. For the sauce, melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Stir in flour and blend well.
5. Reduce heat to low and cook 2 minutes. Blend in milk, broth, sherry, mustard, and curry powder.
6. Bring to boil, stirring constantly. Remove from heat. Taste and season with salt and pepper.
7. To assemble, preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Arrange bread on a baking sheet.
8. Divide mushrooms evenly among slices, mounding slightly in the center. Top each with about 3 tablespoons of sauce and sprinkle with 1/2 cup shredded Swiss cheese.
9. Bake until sandwiches are heated through, about 20 minutes.
